entries.canonical_question: are you legally authorized to work in the united states
observed_variants: Are you legally authorized to work in the US?
Are you authorized to work in the United States?
Do you have the legal right to work in the United States?

entries.canonical_question: will you now or in the future require sponsorship for employment visa status
observed_variants: Will you now or in the future require sponsorship for employment visa status?
Do you require visa sponsorship?
Will you require sponsorship now or in the future?

entries.canonical_question: are you willing to work remotely
observed_variants: Are you willing to work remotely?
Are you open to a remote position?

entries.notes: Profile excludes relocation_required as a deal-breaker keyword.
observed_variants: Are you willing to relocate?
Are you open to relocating for this role?

entries.answer: I am available to start with 2 weeks' notice from my current role.
entries.notes: Template answer; update if notice period changes.
observed_variants: When can you start?
What is your earliest start date?
What is your notice period?

entries.canonical_question: what is your minimum salary expectation
observed_variants: What is your minimum salary expectation?
What are your salary expectations?
Desired base salary?

entries.canonical_question: do you have a security clearance
observed_variants: Do you have a security clearance?
Do you have an active security clearance?
Do you hold any US government security clearance?

entries.canonical_question: how many years of professional software engineering experience do you have
entries.notes: Computed at prepare-application time from candidate-profile experience timeline.
observed_variants: How many years of professional software engineering experience do you have?
Years of experience?
Total years of software engineering experience?

entries.canonical_question: how many years of python experience do you have
entries.notes: Computed from skill-tagged experience highlights mentioning Python.
observed_variants: Years of Python experience?
How many years of Python have you worked with?

entries.canonical_question: how many years of javascript experience do you have
entries.notes: Computed from skill-tagged experience highlights mentioning JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.
observed_variants: Years of JavaScript experience?
Years of TypeScript experience?
How long have you worked with Node.js?

entries.notes: Resolved from contact.links[first github.com or personal domain].

Portfolio or personal website

entries.canonical_question: why are you interested in this role
entries.notes: Rendered per application; synthesizes JD requirements with candidate experience highlights.
observed_variants: Why are you interested in this role?
What interests you about this position?
Why this role?

entries.canonical_question: why are you interested in working at this company
entries.notes: Rendered per application when company research exists; otherwise an honest 'learning about you' answer.
observed_variants: Why are you interested in working here?
Why this company?
What draws you to our mission?

entries.notes: Rendered with a concrete example from experience_highlights.
observed_variants: What is your greatest strength?
What are you best at?

entries.notes: Short bio paragraph synthesized from resume + target_titles.
observed_variants: Tell me about yourself
Tell us about your background
Walk me through your experience

entries.canonical_question: are you currently employed by this company
entries.notes: Universally no; flip manually if ever applying to current employer.
observed_variants: Are you currently employed by us?
Have you previously been employed by this company?
Are you a current or former employee?

entries.canonical_question: are you at least 18 years of age
observed_variants: Are you at least 18 years of age?
Are you 18 or older?
